/** * Header Component * Navigation header with user profile and logout */ import React, { useState } from "react"; function Header({ user, onLogout, onAddMedication }) { const [showUserMenu, setShowUserMenu] = useState(false); // Get user initials for avatar const getInitials = (name) => { if (!name) return "U"; const parts = name.split(" "); if (parts.length >= 2) { return (parts[0][0] + parts[1][0]).toUpperCase(); } return name.substring(0, 2).toUpperCase(); }; return (
{/* Logo and Title */}

MedTracker

Medication Tracker & Reminders

{/* Right Section */}
{/* Add Medication Button */} {/* Mobile Add Button */} {/* User Menu */}
{/* Dropdown Menu */} {showUserMenu && ( <> {/* Backdrop */}
setShowUserMenu(false)} >
{/* Menu */}
{/* User Info */}

{user?.name}

{user?.email}

{/* Menu Items */}
{/* Logout */}
)}
); } export default Header;
